attributes.action: Drill our own gas and oil starting immediately to stabilise our energy security
attributes.additional_details: To improve energy security for the future, for job, industry as well as the bonus of it being more environmentally friendly than ship oil from other countries.
attributes.background: Drill for gas and oil in the North Sea as soon as possible to secure our energy supply and stop dependence on Middle East oil.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make the most of our own natural resources. Allow companies to drill gas and oil
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065
